response.original_title: Volkskrankheit Adipositas - Neue Therapien, neue Risiken?
response.overview: Obesity affects over a billion people worldwide – with consequences such as diabetes, high blood pressure, and psychological distress. New medications like GLP-1 receptor agonists and brain stimulation treatments developed by a team of doctors in Milan are showing initial success. This documentary follows researchers and patients in Germany, France, Italy, and Denmark.
response.title: Volkskrankheit Adipositas - Neue Therapien, neue Risiken?
